title: Fix 'fsg' Text Appended to Metric Names in Service 2 Output
story: As a DataTools Pro user reviewing metric recommendations, I want metric names to display correctly without extra characters appended, so that the recommended names are accurate and professional.
description: The text 'fsg' was being appended to the end of metric names in the Metrics Analyst results, even though the Service 2 API output did not contain this extra text. The issue was a front-end processing bug where extra characters were being concatenated to the metric name during rendering.
acceptance_criteria: Metric names display exactly as returned by Service 2 without extra characters
No 'fsg' or other spurious text is appended to metric names
ux_changes: Metric names now display correctly without 'fsg' appended.
middleware_changes: Fixed the metric name parsing/rendering logic that was appending extra characters.
implementation_notes: The bug was a front-end code issue, not a Service 2 response problem. The developer acknowledged the mistake and fixed it on staging.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed it was a front-end bug and fixed it on staging.
